mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsCnvnPrtcmpnySignDao.selectList */ select ubcps.bsns_cnvn_prtcmpny_sign_id , ubcps.bsns_cnvn_id , ubcps.member_id , cm.member_nm /** 신청자명 */ , cm.ceo_nm /** 대표자명 */ , ubcps.bsnm_sign_dt , to_char(ubcps.bsnm_sign_dt ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as char_bsnm_sign_dt /*사업자서명일시 */ , cm.bizrno /*사업자번호*/ from uspt_bsns_cnvn_prtcmpny_sign ubcps inner join cmmt_member cm on ubcps.member_id = cm.member_id where ubcps.bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId}
